channel.title: Endless Tales
channel.description: Short-form audio dramas for your commute. Full cast, original music, stories that fit the time you have - 3 to 30 minutes. New episodes every week.
channel.itunes:author: Endless Tales

item.title: When Rosie Came Home
item.description: A dog goes missing for two years. Then she shows up on the porch - muddy, thin, and somehow, impossibly, smiling. A 3-minute story about love, loss, and the ones who find their way back. Listen to more at https://endless-tales.com
item.itunes:title: When Rosie Came Home
item.itunes:author: Daniel Wren
item.itunes:summary: A dog goes missing for two years. Then she shows up on the porch - muddy, thin, and somehow, impossibly, smiling. A 3-minute heartwarming story.

item.title: The Grave He Dug Himself
item.description: A retired sheriff comes home to bury his estranged brother - only to find the grave already dug and his brother standing next to it, holding a rifle and thirty years of unfinished business. A 14-minute western thriller. Listen to more at https://endless-tales.com
item.itunes:title: The Grave He Dug Himself
item.itunes:author: James Calloway
item.itunes:summary: A retired sheriff. A dug grave. A brother with a rifle and thirty years of secrets. A 14-minute western thriller.

item.title: The Letters He Was Meant to Carry
item.description: A widowed bus driver finds a backpack full of handwritten letters addressed to strangers across the country - and decides to deliver every one of them. A 14-minute drama about connection, grief, and small acts of kindness. Listen to more at https://endless-tales.com
item.itunes:title: The Letters He Was Meant to Carry
item.itunes:author: Sarah Mitchell
item.itunes:summary: 47 undelivered letters. One bus driver who decides to change that. A 14-minute drama about connection and small acts of kindness.
